notes: Spec asserts two bullets: (1) Session appears in ready within 1s of agent launch and (2) PID bound within 1s. Both phases anchor to recording start (agent launch) and budget 1000ms — claudecode's pre-session row (proc-<PID>) satisfies both, independent of lazy UUID-transcript materialization. The recipe's send+wait_turn steps materialize the UUID transcript but the spec does NOT assert anything about it; the transcript bullets live with basic-turn.

text: Session appears in ready within 1s of agent launch
